_notes.gemini_vision_env: Requires GEMINI_API_KEY exported in your shell. Free tier 15 req/min. Get a key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey and add `export GEMINI_API_KEY=...` to your shell rc.
_notes.exa_endpoint: Uses the advanced endpoint. Only `web_search_advanced_exa` is recommended (per project decision). Auth via Exa's HTTP transport.
_notes.slack_oauth: Slack's MCP does NOT support RFC 7591 dynamic client registration, so a pre-registered clientId is required. The clientId above is Anthropic's public Slack app (published in anthropics/claude-plugins-official). Fork users do NOT need to register their own Slack app — just run `/mcp` → Authenticate, then a Slack workspace admin approves the app once. If you prefer to register your own app, replace clientId at https://api.slack.com/apps.
_notes.http_mcps: atlassian / figma / exa support standard browser-OAuth via /mcp Authenticate (no clientId needed). Slack requires the pre-registered clientId above. Run /mcp after install and authorize each.
_notes.fork_note: This .mcp.json was sanitized for public-fork use — no tokens, no maintainer-specific history. Adjust freely for your own setup.
